rule: Automate CardNews drafting and assembly, but preserve human editorial judgment and account-specific variation.
pipeline: determine variable slide count from available story and media
strengthen the first-slide hook without distorting the source
edit each slide for one clear role and mobile readability
verify facts, numbers, names, quotes, and sources
remove repeated AI rhythm and generic filler
check save, share, comment, or follow value
review the result inside the account's first-screen grid
do_not: force eight slides because the source example used eight
reuse product introduction plus three benefits plus purchase CTA for every topic
invent numbers or details to fill a slide
treat generated copy as final without editorial review
